milestoneTitle: Phase 8.12.37 — nav goes transparent Apple glass with impressed labels. --chips-glass-top/bottom dropped to rgba(255,255,255,0.32→0.14); each chip bg becomes 0.22→0.08 white gradient + backdrop blur+saturate. Chip labels render as debossed text: rgba(0,0,0,0.42) + stacked text-shadow (white highlight below, dark above). Active chip stays solid white for prominence and clears the text-shadow
